home.title: Desde Cero
home.subtitle: Connecting earthquake victims with transporters and hosts in Venezuela
home.heroDesc: Civil logistics platform connecting volunteers, organizations and victims to coordinate effective aid.
home.ctaTransporteDesc: Offer to carry people or cargo
home.paso1Desc: Create your account as victim, transporter or host.
home.paso2Desc: Post your travel request, transport or housing offer.
home.paso3Desc: Find matches and coordinate the trip or stay.
home.impactSubtitle: Every number represents real people helping each other rebuild Venezuela.
home.statsViajesDesc: Relocation trip requests submitted by people who need to move.
home.statsTransportistasDesc: Drivers willing to transport people and cargo to safe areas.
home.statsVoluntariosDesc: People committed to helping coordinate and manage aid.
home.statsOrganizacionesDesc: Groups and organizations that have joined to coordinate relief efforts.
home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about how Desde Cero works and our terms of use.
home.faq1A: Desde Cero is a community platform that connects people affected by disaster with drivers, hosts, and donors willing to help. We don't own vehicles, homes, or resources of our own — our only role is to act as an intermediary between those who need help and those who can offer it.
home.faq2Q: Does Desde Cero organize the trips, lodging, or donations?
home.faq2A: No. Every trip, stay, or donation is arranged and carried out directly between the platform's users. We only facilitate the connection.
home.faq3Q: Is Desde Cero responsible if something goes wrong between users?
home.faq3A: Since we don't take part directly in transportation, lodging, or the handling of resources, Desde Cero does not guarantee or take responsibility for the availability, quality, safety, or fulfillment of agreements made between users. Each person is responsible for verifying information with whoever they choose to coordinate with.
home.faq4Q: What are my responsibilities as a user of the platform?
home.faq4A: By registering, you agree to provide truthful information, act in good faith, and take the necessary precautions before coordinating a trip, stay, or delivery of supplies with another person. We recommend verifying identities and sharing your contact details only with people you consider trustworthy.
home.faq5Q: Is it free to use Desde Cero?
home.faq5A: Yes, registering and using the platform to post or look for help is completely free. Only donations to the platform or between users are optional.
home.faq6Q: How are donations made through the platform used?
home.faq6A: Donations are voluntary and go toward covering costs such as transportation, fuel, lodging, or direct assistance to families. Desde Cero does not hold or manage these funds as a business; we act as a coordination channel between donors and those who need support.
home.faq7Q: How does Desde Cero protect my information?
home.faq7A: The information you share is used only to facilitate connections within the platform. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
home.faq8Q: Can these terms of use change?
home.faq8A: Yes, these terms may be updated as the platform evolves. We recommend reviewing them periodically in this same section.
home.faq9Q: How can I contact Desde Cero if I have questions?
home.faq9A: If you have questions about these terms or how the platform works, you can reach us through our contact page.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We connect people to help those who need it most after the earthquake in Venezuela
about.missionText: Desde Cero was born to coordinate humanitarian aid efficiently, connecting victims with transport, housing, jobs and donations. We believe in the power of community to rebuild together.
about.solidarityDesc: We believe in helping without expecting anything in return, putting people first.
about.communityDesc: We foster support networks where everyone can contribute and receive help.
about.missionDesc: Every resource, every trip, every donation is traceable and verifiable.
about.reachDesc: We operate in all 23 states of Venezuela, reaching where help is needed most.
about.joinUsDesc: There are many ways to help. Whether offering transport, housing or resources, your support makes a difference.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Desde Cero is a community platform that connects displaced people with drivers, hosts, and donors willing to help. By using this platform, you agree to the following terms.
terms.sectionServiceBody: Desde Cero does not own vehicles, housing, money, or resources of its own. Our only role is to act as an intermediary connecting people who need help with those who can offer it. Every trip, stay, or donation is arranged and carried out directly between the platform's users.
terms.sectionLiabilityBody: Because we do not directly participate in transportation, housing, or the handling of resources, Desde Cero does not guarantee or take responsibility for the availability, quality, safety, or fulfillment of arrangements made between users. Each person is responsible for verifying information with whoever they choose to coordinate help with.
terms.sectionUserBody: By registering, you agree to provide truthful information, act in good faith, and take the necessary precautions before coordinating a trip, stay, or supply drop-off with another person. We recommend verifying identities and sharing contact information only with people you consider trustworthy.
terms.sectionDonationsBody: Donations made through this platform are voluntary and go toward the costs described on the Donate page (transportation, gas, housing, or direct help to families). Desde Cero does not hold or manage these funds as a business; it acts as a coordination channel between donors and those who need support.
terms.sectionPrivacyBody: The information you share is used only to facilitate connections within the platform. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
terms.sectionChangesBody: These terms may be updated as the platform evolves. We recommend reviewing them periodically.
terms.sectionContactBody: If you have questions about these terms, you can reach us through our contact page.
